titleStmt.title: Memorandum of Conversation, by Mr. Robert A. Fearey, of the Division of Northeast Asian Affairs

head.hi: Memorandum of Conversation, by Mr. Robert A. Fearey, of the Division of Northeast Asian Affairs

div.p: In accordance with Mr. Allison’s and Mr. Bond’sNiles W. Bond, Assistant Chief of the Division of Northeast Asian Affairs. instructions I called Colonel MilnerCol. W. W. Milner, P & O (Plans and Operations), Department of the Army. today to inform him that the Department had decided in light of the considerations advanced in General Eberle’s memorandum of January 27 to Mr. DraperBrig. Gen. George L. Eberle, Department of the Army; memorandum not attached to file copy. that it would not press its proposal for rescission of the pre-FEC “U.S. Initial Post-Surrender Policy for Japan” (JCS Serial No. 10)September 22, 1945; see Foreign Relations, 1945, vol. vi, p. 720. and “Basic Initial Post-Surrender Directive” (JCS Serial No. 18).November 8, 1945; for text, see ibid., p. 815. I stated that it was our view, however, that it should be made unmistakably clear in future instructions to General MacArthur that the instructions are to be controlling in any respects in which they may be at variance or in conflict with these early directives.
Colonel Milner thanked me for the information and said that he would inform Mr. Draper.
